name: icr-merge
description: ICR — Intent-aware Code Replication: a 3-way merge that understands code structure and author intent. Structural merging, rename detection across call sites, semantic-conflict detection, parse-guaranteed output. Drop-in git merge driver. Built for AI-agent-authored code.

scripts.test: node test/icr-test.js && node test/icr-lang-test.js && node test/icr-multilang-test.js && node test/icr-converge-test.js && node test/icr-fuzz-test.js && node test/icr-torture-test.js && node test/api-test.mjs && node test/git-e2e-test.mjs && node test/git-e2e-multilang-test.mjs

author: Ganesh Shivlal Kute (https://github.com/GSK7024)
